description_long: This object consists of a diverse group of adult pedestrians, each depicted in a standing pose and dressed in a variety of urban clothing styles. The group includes individuals with different body types, hairstyles, and postures, reflecting a realistic cross-section of city dwellers. Some figures are shirtless, while others wear jackets, hoodies, or casual tops, and a range of pants and footwear is visible. The arrangement also includes a row of clothing items and accessories, such as jackets and pants, displayed separately from the figures. The overall scene is visually dynamic, with the pedestrians facing forward and slightly spaced apart, as if waiting or gathering in a public space. The asset is suitable for populating urban environments with lifelike human presence and attire.
description: A group of adult pedestrians in varied urban clothing, standing in relaxed poses with some clothing items displayed separately. The figures represent a realistic mix of city dwellers, ideal for urban scene population.
description_view_0: Side view showing the group of pedestrians, with a clear display of separate clothing items and accessories to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the faces, postures, and full outfits of the pedestrians, with a visible text sign above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the backs and sides of the figures, with clothing items and accessories on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view of the group, with the text sign mirrored and the arrangement of pedestrians and clothing items visible from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: casual urban wear including t-shirts, hoodies, jackets, and jeans with some figures shirtless and others in athletic or streetwear styles
attribute_hairstyle: short hair, bald, and closely cropped styles
